positive: An intricate, symmetrical celestial floral mandala pattern. The design features stylized nebulae swirls, geometric crystalline structures, and bioluminescent glowing flora, arranged in a perfect radial composition. Use a rich color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, ethereal gold, and magenta pops. The style should be clean, highly detailed psychedelic engraving meets elegant Art Nouveau linework, with strong, flat silhouettes against a dark, contrasting background. Vector illustration quality, designed for seamless apparel printing, centered, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
